title: Advisor scout-run — warm up 'testing_infrastructure' (never run)
perceive: Keep advisor 'testing_infrastructure' warm and current — advisors are Ozi's special attention on a specialty. Reason due: never run. Advisor home: WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/. Run its specialty scan and record the run so last_run_at reflects today.
execute: 1. Read WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/context_prompt.md and feeds.yaml to load testing_infrastructure's charter, scan scope, and inputs.
2. Perform testing_infrastructure's specialty scan as described in its context_prompt; produce concrete, impact-ranked findings.
3. Append findings to WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/findings-log.jsonl (one JSON object per finding).
4. For any actionable finding, write a haiku task lug to WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/implementation/open/ (model_fit=haiku, initiative=crew-maintenance).
5. Set last_run_at=2026-06-15T11:45:48.430386Z in WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json (entry advisor_id=testing_infrastructure) AND WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/scan_state.json.
verify: schedule-index.json and WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/scan_state.json both show last_run_at=today for 'testing_infrastructure'; any findings were appended to findings-log.jsonl.

findings.summary: advisor testing_infrastructure's first run detected 67 lug status inconsistencies (high), test coverage crisis with inverted pyramid (high), 3 E2E test failures (medium), and stale test coverage report (medium). Four actionable implementation lugs created for remediation.

resolution_notes: ✅ COMPLETED: Scan completed successfully. All 4 findings appended to findings-log.jsonl. Four implementation lugs created in bytype/implementation/open/: (1) impl-lug-status-consistency-audit-v1 (fix 67 inconsistent lugs), (2) impl-test-coverage-pyramid-phase-1-v1 (remediate test coverage crisis), (3) impl-e2e-test-failures-investigation-v1 (fix 3 failing tests), (4) impl-refresh-test-coverage-report-v1 (refresh stale report). Schedule index and scan_state.json updated with last_run_at=2026-06-15T11:45:48.430386Z.
